headline: Does Snap-on’s Earnings Miss and Institutional Selling Change the Bull Case For Snap-on (SNA)?
summary: In the past quarter, Snap-on reported Q4 2025 earnings of US$4.94 per share on US$1.23 billion in revenue, missing analyst expectations while continuing to offer a 2.72% dividend with an ex-dividend date that has since passed on February 24, 2026. At the same time, SG Americas Securities sharply cut its Snap-on holdings even as analysts maintained generally positive views on the company’s fundamentals and outlook. We’ll now examine how the recent earnings miss, alongside this institutional...
